drl:
rule "R0"
no-loop
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1(f0 < 2.5, $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f1)
    exists T1(f1 > 11)
    T1(f2 <= 7, f0 == $b0_0_0, $b0_2_0 : f2, $b0_2_1 : f2)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    T1(f1 <= 0, !(f0 == 3 || f2 not in (4, -1000000007, 10)))
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -8
when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T1($b2_0_0, $p2_0.getF0(), 100));
    insert(new T1(100, $p2_0.getF0(), -3));
end
rule "R3"
when
    exists T0(f0 >= 100)
then
    insert(new T1(-1000000007, -4, 12));
end
rule "R4"
salience 9
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1(f1 < 9, $b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    ( $p5_0 : T1($b5_0_0 : f2) )
    or
    ( $p5_0 : T1($b5_0_0 : f2) )
then
    delete($p5_0);
end
